mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(T.id) FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.id = T.id WHERE T.id > 0

SELECT T.id AS id ,C.code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%Y-%m-%d') AS publicationDate ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%H:%i') AS publicationTime ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%w') AS dayOfWeek ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.id = T.id INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = E.country_code WHERE T.id > 0
ORDER BY T.publication
ORDER BY T.publication DESC
LIMIT 0, #{size} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT T.id AS id ,C.code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%Y-%m-%d') AS publicationDate ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%H:%i') AS publicationTime ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%w') AS dayOfWeek ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.id = T.id INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = E.country_code WHERE T.id = #{id} AND T.publication = #{publication}

SELECT T.id AS id ,C.code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.id = T.id INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = E.country_code INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator_data_load L ON T.id = L.id AND T.publication = L.publication WHERE T.result_value != L.result_value OR T.forecast_value != L.forecast_value OR T.previous_value != L.previous_value
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_economic_indicator_data SELECT L.id ,L.publication ,L.sub_title ,L.result_value ,L.forecast_value ,L.previous_value ,L.memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data_load L LEFT JOIN fx_economic_indicator_data D ON D.id = L.id AND D.publication = L.publication WHERE D.id IS NULL
